brief_html: Creates a game in a manner similar to SID_STARTADVEX and SID_STARTADVEX3.
format:
(UINT32) Status
(UINT32) Unknown
(UINT16) Game Type
(UINT16) Unknown
(UINT32) Unknown
(UINT32) Port
(STRING) Game name
(STRING) Game password
(STRING) Game stats - Flags, Creator, Statstring
remarks_html:
Creates a game in a manner similar to SID_STARTADVEX and SID_STARTADVEX3.

This message is used by Diablo to create a game. It was also used by Starcraft 1.03.

See documentation on SID_STARTADVEX3 for details on the values and their meanings.
